stemHtml: Complete the definition of an instrument approach procedure: Instrument approach procedure means a series of predetermined manoeuvres by reference to flight instruments with specified protection from obstacles from the initial approach fix, or where applicable, from the...

options.a: end of a defined departure route to a point from which a landing can be completed.
options.b: beginning of a defined arrival route to a point from which a landing can be completed.
options.c: beginning of a defined arrival route to a point from which a landing can be completed and thereafter, if a landing is not completed, to a position at which holding or en-route obstacle clearance criteria apply.
options.d: end of a defined departure route to a point from which a landing can be completed and thereafter, if a landing is not completed, to a position at which holding or en-route obstacle clearance criteria apply.
